title: Cross-asset end-of-day wrap
description: Single-page scrollable wrap of all major asset classes. 17 charts stress-test the compositor; customisation knobs exercise legend placement, label humanisation, date formatting, and KPI formatters.

filters.label: Lookback
filters.description: Filters every time-series chart on this page to the selected lookback window. Does not affect the sector / top-movers panels.

filters.label: Sector
filters.description: Filter the Top movers table by S&P 500 GICS sector. Same filter is set by clicking a bar in the S&P 500 sectors YTD chart above.

rows.title: S&P 500 sectors YTD
rows.info: Click a sector bar to filter the top-movers table below.

rows.title: Single-name top movers (click a row for detail)
rows.info: Rows highlighted green / red based on 1-day move. Click a sector bar above to filter.
